summary: AUDIT SUMMARY: Redback Exhausts (15/15 verified): All parts found on website with correct SKUs, titles, categories, and images. 13/15 have accurate RRP; 3 items (K-RPM16021, K-RPM16022, K-RPM15636) show OUT_OF_STOCK status. RAW 4x4 (15/15 verified): All parts found on website with correct SKUs, titles, categories, and images. CRITICAL ISSUE: All 634 RAW 4x4 parts have RRP=0 in the master catalogue - every sampled part shows RRP pending on the website. This is a systematic data gap requiring supplier price feed update. Pacemaker (15/15 verified): All parts found on website with correct SKUs, titles, categories, and images. All have accurate RRP values. All sampled parts show stock status UNKNOWN (not IN_STOCK or OUT_OF_STOCK). eBay store: Could not perform systematic search due to 403 Forbidden blocking, but initial store page scan showed some Redback and Pacemaker items listed. No RAW 4x4 items visible in initial scan. RECOMMENDATION: 1) Urgently obtain RRP data for all 634 RAW 4x4 parts from supplier. 2) Review stock status accuracy for Redback and Pacemaker parts. 3) Consider adding RAW 4x4 parts to eBay store.
